creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
After upgrade to 4.7.0_4 screen would not start: it just hangs after start. A rollback to screen-4.7.0_1 fixes the problem. The system is 11.3-RELEASE.

Compile options:

Options        :
        INFO           : on
        NAMED_PIPES    : off
        NCURSES_BASE   : off
        NCURSES_DEFAULT: on
        NCURSES_PORT   : off
        NETHACK        : on
        SHOWENC        : off
        SOCKETS        : on
        SYSTEM_SCREENRC: on
        XTERM_256      : on
